title: Role Play
overview: Tsukasa is trapped in an MMORPG called The World. With his conscious inaccessible, Tsukasa attempts to find his purpose for being in the game.

title: Guardian
overview: Tsukasa’s inability to log out of the world worries Mimiru. The Crimson Knights, on the other hand, see Tsukasa as a threat.

title: Folklore
overview: BT and Sora suspect that Tsukasa is somehow connected to a very important artifact, the Key of the Twilight.

title: Wanted
overview: Tsukasa's rampaging Guardian monster wreaks havoc in The World, and an edict from Subaru makes him a wanted man.

title: Captured
overview: Tsukasa finally tames his Guardian monster, but unbeknownst to him, someone is plotting his capture.

title: Encounter
overview: Subaru carefully observes Tsukasa, gradually getting to know him. Sora mounts a rescue mission.

title: Reason
overview: Mimiru encounters a novice player and offers her guidance in The World. This new relationship helps Mimiru uncover her own motivation for playing.

title: Promise
overview: Mimiru extends Tsukasa an invitation to meet; BT and Crim share an interesting encounter.

title: Epitaph
overview: An elite hacker proves instrumental in the quest for the Key of the Twilight, and Tsukasa gets stuck with a sick Grunty.

title: Compensation
overview: Bear's shortcomings as a father may be the root of his concern for Tsukasa. Clues arise as the search for the Key of the Twilight continues.

title: Party
overview: Mimiru, Bear, and Tsukasa join forces before embarking on a non-fighting quest.

title: Entanglement
overview: Tsukasa stumbles upon Aura, an advanced AI, that is being held captive.

title: Twilight Eye
overview: A way to open the Twilight Eye is discovered, and the group decides to follow the new path unfolding before them.

title: Castle
overview: After the Eye is opened, a secret area appears, complicating the group's search for the key.

title: Evidence
overview: Revisit all the major moments from this groundbreaking anime in a series of vivid flashbacks that may shed new light on past events!

title: Depth
overview: Tsukasa logs back into The World, only to discover that he cannot die. Shocked, he turns to Subaru for answers.

title: Conflict
overview: Crim refuses to meet BT outside of the game. Later, Tsukasa mounts a rescue attempt – and secrets are revealed.

title: Declaration
overview: Silver Knight disrupts any and all potential rendezvous between Subaru and Tsukasa. Subaru ponders the future of the Crimson Knights.

title: Recollection
overview: Subaru drifts aimlessly through The World, reflecting on her past experiences. Her connection with Tsukasa grows even stronger after an unexpected attack.

title: Tempest
overview: Aura goes missing, Morganna attacks Tsukasa, and the search for the Key of the Twilight continues.

title: Despair
overview: Tsukasa lingers in a catatonic state, and some immensely powerful monsters make their presence felt in The World.

title: Phantom
overview: Bear, Mimiru, and Subaru are attacked by yet another seemingly-unstoppable monster, but Balmung comes to the rescue.

title: The Eve
overview: Tsukasa is too frightened to pass through Helba's gate, and Crim explains Subaru's true life condition.

title: Net Slum
overview: Upon arriving in Helba's realm – Net Slum – the group is forced to defend Subaru from an attack by Morganna.

title: Catastrophe
overview: As the battle intensifies, the group seeks shelter in the Cathedral. Morganna summons Guardians to do her bidding.

title: Return
overview: Drawing strength from Subaru, Tsukasa summons the courage to awaken Aura. Outside of The World, players share a true life encounter.

title: The Legendary Hero
overview: After winning a contest, twins Shugo and Rena enter The World as legendary hacker characters. Shugo is defeated by an unexpectedly powerful monster, which leads to his resurrection by a mysterious woman.

title: Kite’s Bracelet
overview: Balmung decides to throw an event to make cherry blossom trees bloom, which Shugo, Rena, and their new sidekick Mireille decide to attend. After a monster appears, Shugo must rely on a furry friend for help in battle.

title: The Phoenix Feather
overview: Shugo levels up by letting the members in his party do all the work. Next, he helps another player whose sick grunty can only be cured with an item located in a dangerous part of The World.

title: Tanabata Night
overview: Sanjuro begins to train Shugo, and Rena is selected as the damsel in distress in an event that can make wishes come true.

title: Mansion of Terror
overview: Rena falls into a trap that was intended for Shugo. Her disappearance leaves the group wondering where she’s gone.

title: Trap of the Hot Steaming Water
overview: The search for Rena begins. A mysterious message leads the search party to a dangerous location. The party is caught off guard by heartbreaking news.

title: Twilight Moon
overview: Rena remains in a comatose state and is unable to log out of The World. Balmung reveals that several other users have been affected in a similar way.

title: The Solitary Knight
overview: Balmung has his role as an administrator taken away, and Rena attempts to contact Shugo with the help of Aura.

title: Footsteps of Collapse
overview: Shugo uses a new ability to try and reach Rena. The two are almost united, but a rogue AI complicates the situation.

title: Capital of Illusion
overview: Shugo continues his training with the group, and their teamwork is tested by the appearance of a new monster.

title: The End of the World
overview: After fending off a dangerous wave of attacks, the group learns of Aura’s plan to maintain the balance of The World through the use of unconventional methods.

title: The Legend Begins
overview: A virus prevents the party from achieving victory in battle. With data drain left as the only option, Shugo must use his abilities like never before to save Rena.

title: Welcome to "The World"
overview: Haseo's entrance into The World is marked by a hostile attack – and a crushing defeat. His adventure appears to be over before it started until a mysterious stranger gives him new life.

title: Twilight Brigade
overview: His search for information about his mysterious savior leads to an invitation for Haseo to join Ovan’s guild.

title: Join
overview: Rumors being spread about Haseo lead to attacks against him. Invitations to join two separate guilds intrigue him, but an encounter with Shino will influence his choice.

title: Fore Feel
overview: Haseo embarks on a journey through the game on a quest to level up, Sakisaka grows suspicious, and Tabby meets an untimely end.

title: Distrust
overview: Haseo is suspected of acting as a spy, putting him at odds with the Twilight Bridgade. His actions after the falling out only serve to further implicate him.

title: Conflict
overview: Concerns over Sakisaka’s loyalty arise, The World experiences technical difficulties, and Haseo unveils a few new tricks.

title: Intrigue
overview: Strange occurrences plague The World as Haseo wanders the Lost Grounds. Later, a group exploration leads to shocking new knowledge and a sudden disappearance!

title: Starting
overview: The group stumbles upon a portal, Haseo shares an encounter with Ender, and more is learned about the virus cores.

title: Melee
overview: While attempting to collect all the Virus Cores, the Twilight Brigade is attacked by adversaries – and relocated to a mysterious, unknown area.

title: Missing
overview: Ovan wanders into a trap while searching for the Key of Twilight. Shino, in an attempt to secure Ovan’s release, makes a bold threat!

title: Discord
overview: Gord gives serious thought to leaving The World for good, and the administrators take serious action against some online outlaws.

title: Breakup
overview: The Twilight Brigade is forcibly disbanded, Gord finally arrives at a decision regarding his involvement in The World, and Haseo makes a vow to Shino.

title: Tragedy
overview: Tabby has some shocking news for Haseo, and Shino’s precious data beings to disappear.

title: Unreturner
overview: Haseo is devastated about his inability to prevent Shino from falling into a comatose state. Tabby has plans for a new guild, but its lack of members is troubling.

title: Pad
overview: Tabby encounters two players who are new to The World. Later, she learns the secrets to leveling up, and Haseo embarks on a quest for revenge.

title: Resolution
overview: Phyllo attempts to comfort Haseo, who continues to agonize over his comatose friend. A dangerous new quest – and the promise of newfound power – tempts Haseo.

title: Painful Forest
overview: Tabby’s been worried about Haseo since his departure to the Forest of Pain. She expresses her concern to Subaro, who is instructed by Pi to follow Haseo into the forest. Meanwhile, Yata and Pi prod Phyllo for information about his relationship with Ovan.

title: Limit
overview: Tabby is still struggling with her inability to help Haseo in the Forest of Pain. In the forest, Haseo grows frustrated with the ever-growing amount of monsters he must fight before going deeper, but his quest for more power may be his downfall.

title: Violation
overview: Tawaraya returns unde the moniker “Tohta” to discover a gang of money traders has been flooding the market, creating high inflation. Despite his quest for secrecy, Tohta can’t stand back and let the money traders fleece innocent players, and decides to intervene.

title: Pursuit
overview: As Haseo’s search for information about Tri-Edge continues, his sanity begins to slip away, and in a murderous rage he kills several PKs. Yata and Pi are still on the hunt for Haseo’s factor. They send Subaro to retrieve it, but she can’t overcome Haseo’s manic strength.

title: Defeat
overview: A mysterious new player, Midori, has started a “hit-me-if-you-can” service. Haseo, still in the grips of manic power, enlists her services in order to discover Tri-Edge’s whereabouts. Meanwhile, Tohka encourages Tabby to start her own guild.

title: Bonds
overview: Tabby starts a new healing guild, but so far they haven’t had much success. Tohka points out that their levels are way to low to help anyone, and demands they go out and raise them. Haseo finally makes an appearance in town, and Phyllo warns him about the dangers of being single-minded.

title: Trial
overview: Haseo, consumed by a violent mania, will stop at nothing to find Tri-Edge, even it if means slaughtering any Player Killer who steps in his way. But while on his murderous rampage he’s left behind a trail of PK enemies who band together to stop him.

title: Confront
overview: After brutally slaughtering all the PKers, Haseo earns the nickname “The Terror of Death.” Still in the grips of insanity, Haseo refuses help or warnings from his old guild. But when Haseo finally encounters Tri-Edge, will he able to carry out his plan?

title: Truth
overview: There’s been no sign of Haseo for several days now, and rumors swirl that he’s quit for good. In his absence, Tabby has a realization, and also discovers a new love interest! Meanwhile, Phyllo divulges something shocking to Tohta.

title: Determination
overview: Haseo reappears after his hiatus only to receive devastating news about Phyllo. Tabby finally discovers the confidence to make her own decisions, and informs Haseo she has decided to become a nurse in order to save Shino. Now, Haseo is alone with only his memories to keep him company.
